content:
🎉 Excited to share another achievement!
I’m delighted to announce that I have successfully completed the "Data Processing and Visualisation" course offered by FutureSkills Prime under the IT-ITeS Sector Skills Council (SSC), NASSCOM. This course enhanced my understanding of data processing techniques, data cleaning, and visualization—essential skills for Data Science, Machine Learning, and Business Analytics.
I’m also proud to be a student of Shobhit University, which has collaborated with NASSCOM through an MoU to promote industry-aligned learning and skill development. This partnership enables students to gain practical knowledge and certifications that prepare them for future career opportunities.
A heartfelt thank you to NASSCOM FutureSkills Prime and Shobhit University for supporting my continuous learning journey. Looking forward to applying these skills in real-world data-driven projects!

comment: Course foundations help, but real projects often hinge on messy, evolving datasets, schema drift, and unclear business metrics where SQL depth and pipeline thinking matter more than certificates.
